It has been tested for weights from 3.5 to 15 kg, but the most optimal conditions for comfortable wearing are achieved up to 9 kg of the child's weight. It consists of a stretchy and soft 100% organic cotton jersey with GOTS certification, which guarantees the environmental sustainability and safety of the material. The edges of the scarf are distinguished by a flexible stitch, which ensures better orientation when tying it. The scarf can be tied securely and easily thanks to the tapered ends and the centre is marked with the "Manduca" logo. The scarf can be machine washed at 40 °C and is not designed for tumble drying.
